About Us

Indonesia's Spice Heritage, Delivered

PT Meraki Nusantara Commodities is an export-oriented company specializing in Indonesia's finest culinary and medicinal spices. We work directly with local farmers across the best spice-growing regions of Indonesia — from the cardamom highlands to the legendary Maluku clove islands — to deliver consistently premium quality to global buyers.

We operate on a pre-order basis to ensure every shipment is freshly processed to exact specifications. Every batch is Halal certified and BPOM registered, backed by full export documentation for seamless international trade.

🤝
Direct Farmer Partnerships Sourced directly from vetted farmers in Indonesia's premier spice-growing regions, ensuring authentic origin and fair trade.
🌶️
Origin-True Quality Each spice variety is grown in its ideal terroir — guaranteeing the aromatic intensity and potency that global markets demand.
📦
Pre-Order Freshness Every batch processed fresh on order — so your shipment arrives at peak aroma, color, and potency.
Premium Grade

Our Spices

Four Spices, Exceptional Quality

Request a Quote →
Cardamom
Indonesian Highlands
Cardamom

Finest green cardamom from the highlands of Indonesia, prized for its intense aromatic profile and superior essential oil content. Available whole pods and ground.

HalalBPOMExport Grade
Inquire →

🌿 Cardamom — Product Detail

Our green cardamom is sourced from the lush highland regions of Indonesia, where cool temperatures and volcanic soil produce pods with exceptionally high essential oil content. Renowned for its warm, spicy-sweet aroma, Indonesian cardamom is prized by spice traders across the Middle East, Europe, and Asia.

Origin
Indonesian Highlands
Available Forms
Whole Pods · Ground Powder
Color
Green · Grade A
Use
Culinary · Beverages · Health
Certification

Turmeric
Java, Indonesia
Turmeric

High-curcumin Indonesian turmeric with a vibrant golden hue. Available as whole root, sliced dried, or fine powder. Widely used in food, nutraceuticals, and cosmetics.

HalalBPOMExport Grade
Inquire →

🟡 Turmeric — Product Detail

Indonesian turmeric is celebrated for its naturally high curcumin concentration. Our turmeric is cultivated in fertile Javanese soils and carefully sun-dried to preserve its potency, making it ideal for food manufacturing, health supplements, and cosmetic formulations.

Origin
Java, Indonesia
Available Forms
Whole Root · Sliced Dry · Powder

Ginger
Java & Sumatra, Indonesia
Ginger

Premium dried ginger with high gingerol content and a bold, pungent aroma. Available fresh, dried whole, sliced, or as fine powder — perfect for beverages, food processing, and health products.

HalalBPOMExport Grade
Inquire →

🫚 Ginger — Product Detail

Indonesian ginger is widely regarded as among the world's finest, known for its high gingerol content. Grown across the volcanic soils of Java and Sumatra, our ginger is available in multiple processed forms to meet the precise requirements of food manufacturers, beverage producers, and health product companies worldwide.

Java & Sumatra, Indonesia

Cloves
Maluku Islands, Indonesia
Cloves

Premium cloves from the Maluku islands — the original birthplace of cloves. Known worldwide for exceptional eugenol content, intense fragrance, and superior flavoring power.

HalalBPOMExport Grade
Inquire →

🌰 Cloves — Product Detail

The Maluku Islands of Indonesia are the historic birthplace of cloves — and to this day produce the world's most sought-after cloves. Our Maluku cloves are hand-harvested at peak ripeness and carefully dried to preserve their extraordinarily high eugenol content, delivering unmatched aromatic intensity for food, pharmaceutical, and cosmetic applications globally.

Origin
Maluku Islands, Indonesia

Whole · Ground Powder
Active Compound

Food · Pharmaceutical · Cosmetics

How We Work

From Farm to Freight

Every spice we ship follows a meticulous process ensuring freshness, quality, and full compliance with international standards.

01
Source & Select

Direct partnerships with vetted local farmers in Indonesia's premier spice-growing regions — highlands, volcanic plains, and island estates.

02
Process & Grade

Hygienic processing in certified facilities. Each spice graded, cleaned, and prepared to exact buyer specifications.

03
Certify & Pack

BPOM registration, Halal certification, and premium-grade packaging tailored for bulk and industrial orders.

04
Ship Globally

Export-ready logistics with full documentation. We ship to markets worldwide meeting all international trade standards.

Why Choose Us

A Reliable Spice Partner

We are more than a supplier — a committed partner for food manufacturers, spice traders, and importers who demand consistency, authenticity, and integrity in every shipment.

Start a Conversation
🏆
Authentic Origin

Every spice sourced from its ideal Indonesian growing region — Maluku cloves, highland cardamom, Javanese turmeric and ginger.

🌍
Global Export Standards

Fully compliant with international trade requirements. BPOM registered, Halal certified, and export-ready documentation prepared for each order.

🤝
Committed Partnership

Long-term relationships built on trust and transparency. We grow with our clients and adapt to their evolving supply needs.

📦
Pre-Order Freshness

Processed fresh on order — not from warehoused stock — ensuring maximum aroma potency and shelf life for every batch.
